name: Autonomix Medical, Inc.
business: Autonomix Medical, Inc. is a development-stage medical device company focused on advancing technologies for sensing and treating disorders of the nervous system using a catheter-based system that integrates high-sensitivity neural signal detection with targeted radiofrequency ablation. The company is initially targeting the treatment of pain associated with pancreatic cancer.

exposures.sentence: We are a development-stage medical device company focused on advancing technologies for sensing and treating disorders of the nervous system.
Our technology consists of a catheter-based system incorporating a proprietary microchip-enabled sensing architecture designed to detect low-amplitude neural signals from within the vascular system.

catalysts.event: Ethics Committee approval of revised clinical protocol
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to the end of our latest fiscal year, we submitted a revised clinical protocol reflecting these changes, which was approved by the relevant Ethics Committee on April 9, 2026.

catalysts.event: Anticipated commencement of U.S.-based IDE clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: We believe that focusing on this more targeted patient population and refined procedural approach will provide the most relevant data to support the design of our planned U.S.-based clinical trials, which are currently anticipated to commence in late 2026, subject to the receipt of sufficient new financing.
Based on our current expectations, regulatory clearance could potentially occur in the 2028 timeframe; however, this timeline is subject to significant uncertainty and is not guaranteed.

tamClaims.claim: Global pancreatic cancer treatment market approximately $2.2 billion in 2022
tamClaims.sentence: Market analyses estimate the global pancreatic cancer treatment market was approximately $2.2 billion in 2022.

tamClaims.claim: Global electrophysiology market $6.8 billion in 2021 growing to $11.6 billion by 2027
tamClaims.sentence: A Markets and Markets report ('Electrophysiology Market Global Forecast to 2027', February 2023) estimates the global electrophysiology market at $6.8 billion in 2021 and growing to $11.6 billion by 2027, primarily driven by cardiology applications.
We believe that enabling targeted transvascular treatment of pain may provide access to the approximately $75 billion pain management market
our approach to renal denervation may enable access to the $23 billion hypertension market.

tamClaims.claim: More than $100 billion in aggregate market opportunities
tamClaims.sentence: When expanded to include indications such as COPD, irritable bowel syndrome, and overactive bladder, we believe our platform may have the potential to address more than $100 billion in aggregate market opportunities.
